Off Calendar Dec-20-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Christopher Andreas, Esq. of BRAYTON PURCELL 898-1555 for Plaintiffs and opposing party

Mr. Andreas represented in open court that this matter is resolved in the respect that Plaintiff will file a dismissal as to defendant OSRAM SYLVANIA. He represented that defendant was to notify the court to take the matter off calendar. Court will adopt the tentative ruling unless so notified by defense counsel by the end of the day.
(JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Mark C. Davis, Esq. for moving party, deft Osram Sylvania, Inc, (415) 288-9800
John B. Goldstein, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, for the plaintiff, opposing party. (415) 898-1555

Argued and the Court adopted the tentative ruling. Motion for continuance granted to December 20, 2001.
